project_summary.estimator_summary: Secure analysis extracted 0 opening(s) and 22 hardware set(s). Verify against source PDF before bidding.

hardware_set_review.estimator_note: Operation, unlocked hours: Doors closed and electrically dogged via access control system for push/pull operation. Exterior and vestibule actuators both enabled. Pressing either actuator signals automatic operator to one leaf. Free ingress and egress. Operation, locked hours: Doors closed and locked. Exterior actuator disabled. Presenting valid credential to reader momentarily retracts latches allowing entry and enabling exterior actuator. Interior actuator enabled at all times. Pressing interior actuator retracts latch and signals automatic operator to open one leaf. Free egress at all times. Upon loss of power door remains locked (fail-secure).
Operation: Both actuators enabled. Pressing either actuator signals automatic operator to open one leaf. Free egress at all times.
Operation: Door normally closed and locked. Valid credential presentation releases lock for entry. Free egress at all times. Upon loss of power door remains locked (fail-secure).
Operation: Door normally closed and locked. Valid credential presentation releases lock for entry. Free egress at all times. Upon loss of power door remains locked (fail-secure).

Operation: Door normally closed and locked. Valid credential to reader momentarily retracts latch allowing entry. During designated open hours door may be electrically dogged for free ingress. Free egress at all times. Upon loss of power door remains locked (fail-secure).
Operation: Door normally closed and locked. Valid credential presentation releases lock for entry. Free egress at all times. Upon loss of power door remains locked (fail-secure).
Operation: Door normally closed and locked. Valid credential presentation releases latch for entry. Free egress at all times. Upon loss of power door remains locked (fail-secure).
Operation: Door normally closed and locked. Valid credential to reader momentarily retracts latch allowing entry. Free egress at all times. Upon loss of power door remains locked (fail-secure).
Operation: Door normally closed and locked. Valid credential presentation releases lock for entry. Free egress at all times. Upon loss of power door remains locked (fail-secure).
Operation: Door normally closed and locked. Valid credential presentation releases lock for entry. Free egress at all times. Upon loss of power door remains locked (fail-secure).
Operation: Door normally closed and locked. Valid credential presentation releases lock for entry. Free egress at all times. Upon loss of power door remains locked (fail-secure).
Operation: Door normally closed and locked. Valid credential presentation releases lock for entry. Free egress at all times. Upon loss of power door remains locked (fail-secure).

estimator_notes: 22 hardware set(s) identified; 22 have a complete extracted item list.
1 general note(s) captured from the door-schedule sheet.
1 hardware-preamble note(s) captured from hardware-set sheet(s).

supply_only_notes: Submittal package: door, frame and hardware schedules with manufacturer cut sheets, keying schedule, electrified hardware riser, anchor templates.
installation_only_notes: Field-measure all openings before fabrication release. Verify rough-opening size, frame anchor type, and floor condition.
Storage and protection of doors / frames / hardware on site is by GC unless otherwise noted.
exclusions_to_consider: Exclude 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, access-control head-end, intrusion detection programming, fire-alarm tie-in (NIC).
Exclude permits, demolition, painting, drywall patching at frame anchors, floor preparation at thresholds.
coordination_items: Attend pre-installation meeting with GC, EC, low-voltage, fire alarm and security trades.
Hold formal keying meeting with owner before cylinder fabrication.
